gold.methodology: Mine production baseline; demand includes jewelry, bars, official sector, ETFs, and technology where available.
gold.valueCalculationMethod: metric tonnes * 32,150.7466 troy ounces per tonne * USD per troy ounce

silver.methodology: Mine production baseline with byproduct supply context from lead-zinc, copper, and gold operations.
silver.valueCalculationMethod: metric tonnes * 32,150.7466 troy ounces per tonne * USD per troy ounce

platinum.methodology: Mine production baseline; risk model emphasizes PGM concentration in South Africa and Russia.
platinum.valueCalculationMethod: metric tonnes * 32,150.7466 troy ounces per tonne * USD per troy ounce

palladium.methodology: Mine production baseline; downstream exposure focused on auto catalysts and sanctions risk.
palladium.valueCalculationMethod: metric tonnes * 32,150.7466 troy ounces per tonne * USD per troy ounce

copper.methodology: Mine production baseline; demand proxy emphasizes China, grid capex, construction, and smelter flows.
copper.valueCalculationMethod: metric tonnes * 2,204.623 pounds per tonne * USD per pound

wti.methodology: Crude oil production benchmark represented in barrels per day; WTI is a pricing proxy, not total US supply only.
wti.valueCalculationMethod: barrels per day * 365 * USD per barrel

brent.methodology: Global crude/liquids production benchmark represented in barrels per day; Brent is the seaborne pricing proxy.
brent.valueCalculationMethod: barrels per day * 365 * USD per barrel

natgas.methodology: Marketed natural gas production baseline in bcm per year with LNG and pipeline trade context.
natgas.valueCalculationMethod: bcm per year * 35,314,666 MMBtu per bcm * USD per MMBtu

wheat.methodology: Crop production baseline from public crop balance references; trade risk emphasizes Black Sea export reliability.

corn.methodology: Crop production baseline with feed, ethanol, and export corridor risk context.

soybeans.methodology: Oilseed production baseline with Brazil-US-China corridor concentration and crush demand context.

rice.methodology: Crop production baseline; export restriction and food security risk emphasized.

cocoa.methodology: Bean production baseline with West Africa concentration and grinder demand context.

coffee.methodology: Green coffee equivalent production baseline; weather risk emphasizes Brazil arabica and Vietnam robusta.

sugar.methodology: Sugar production baseline; Brazil cane mix links sugar and ethanol markets.

cotton.methodology: Lint/fiber production baseline; textile demand and trade policy risk emphasized.
